name: shooting gallery
items_start: Window. Gun pointing into & mounted by window
hints: A shooting gallery with spectacles and a mounted gun. The gun points through a window.
GET SPEC - the strange spectacles are important. The gun is mounted and can't be taken.
WEAR SPEC to put on the spectacles. They let you see things hidden from normal view.
The spectacles reveal hidden items when worn. SHOO GUN to fire at the clay pigeons visible through the window. N=trampoline room (room 8).
notes: Shooting gallery with strange spectacles (reveal hidden things when worn) and a mounted gun. N=small room with trampoline (room 8).
